name: small underground room
description: I'm in a small underground room
hints: A small underground room with a natter energy egg and a bio gem. The walls have scratch marks.
GET EGG and GET BIO GEM. LOOK WALL to see scratch marks - someone has been trying to claw their way out.
GET the natter energy egg and *Bio gem* (treasure). LOOK WALL shows scratch marks. SCRATCH WALL as the Hulk (with rage) opens a passage. No standard exits - must scratch wall to escape.
Collect both items. SCRATCH WALL while in Hulk rage mode to claw through the wall and create an exit. This requires being angry/transformed.

effects: Message: wall has scratch marks on it.

notes: Small underground room with the natter energy egg and *Bio gem* treasure. No exits until you SCRATCH WALL with Hulk rage (drops item, reveals something). LOOK WALL shows scratch marks as a hint. NORTH from the fuzzy area (room 16) leads here.
